IKM RJ Oracle Incremental Update Merge without Not Exits Std V0.0
IKM RJ Oracle Incremental Update Merge without Not Exits Std V0.0

merge into <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "OPN_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT", "TAXLOTS_OWNER", "D") ?> T using ( select SRC_STM_CD, AR_ID, CIRD_PD_ID, CCAL_PD_ID, ACG_TP_CD, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, END_DT, EFF_DT, ACG_TP_NM, ACQ_DT, ADJ_COST, CCY_CD, CTF_NUM, CTF_NUM_PFX, COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, EXG_RATE, FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, GIFT_DT, POS_INCPTN_DT, LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, MISS_COST_BSS_F, ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, OPN_PRC_FCTR, OPN_TXN_EV_TP, COST_AMT, ORIG_EV_TP, ORIG_PRC, ORIG_PROCD, ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, PREM_AMT, QTY, SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, RVST_LOT_F, SD, TRD_NUM, TXN_INTT_DT, TXN_TP_CD, UC, SBC_UC, WASH_SALE_F, ZERO_COST_BSS_F, WASH_SALE_TP, SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, SBC_ADJ_COST, SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL, SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR, SBC_COST_AMT, SBC_ORIG_PRC, SBC_ORIG_PROCD, SRC_STM_ID, SRC_STM_NM, ACG_TP_ID, TAX_LOT_TP, COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F, MISS_IVS_COST_F, SESN_NUM, CRT_DTM, CRT_USR_NM, LAST_UDT_DTM, LAST_UDT_USR_NM, IND_UPDATE from ( select SRC_STM_DIM.SRC_STM_CD SRC_STM_CD, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.AR_ID AR_ID, CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1.CIRD_PD_ID CIRD_PD_ID, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.CCAL_PD_ID CCAL_PD_ID, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.AC_TP_CODE ACG_TP_CD, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.EFF_TO_DT END_DT, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.EFF_FM_DT EFF_DT, ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_NM ACG_TP_NM, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.ACQ_DT ACQ_DT, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_ADJ_COST_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_ADJ_COST_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END ADJ_COST, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE CCY_CD, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_CTF_NUM CTF_NUM, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_CTF_NUM_PFX CTF_NUM_PFX, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.CVRD_UNCVRD COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE EXG_RATE, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.GIFT_DT GIFT_DT, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.POS_INCPTN_DT POS_INCPTN_DT, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.POS_LONG_SHRT_CODE LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, NULL LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, NULL LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, CASE WHEN (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.MISS_COST_F= 'Y' OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.NULL_BSS_F = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END MISS_COST_BSS_F, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.NULL_BSS_F ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END OPN_PRC_FCTR, CL_VAL1.CL_VAL_NM OPN_TXN_EV_TP, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.NML_ASOF_CRN_COST_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.NML_ASOF_CRN_COST_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END COST_AMT, NULL ORIG_EV_TP, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END ORIG_PRC, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END ORIG_PROCD, NULL ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, null PREM_AMT, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_ASOF_QTY QTY, CL_VAL.CL_VAL_CODE SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.RVST_F RVST_LOT_F, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SD SD, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TRD_NUM TRD_NUM, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TXN_INIT_DT TXN_INTT_DT, NULL TXN_TP_CD, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END UC, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_UC, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_F WASH_SALE_F, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.ZERO_BSS_IND_F ZERO_COST_BSS_F, CASE WHEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_F ='Y' AND OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT = 0 THEN 'CBW' WHEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_F ='Y' AND OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT > 0 THEN 'BOTHW' WHEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_F <> 'Y' AND OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT > 0 THEN 'GLW' else null END WASH_SALE_TP, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_ADJ_COST_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_ADJ_COST_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_ADJ_COST, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ASOF_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_COST_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_OPN_COST_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_COST_AMT, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_ORIG_PRC, case when (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.STM_BASE_ISO_CCY_CODE='USD' or (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT ELSE OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT * OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END SBC_ORIG_PROCD, SRC_STM_DIM.SRC_STM_ID SRC_STM_ID, SRC_STM_DIM.SRC_STM_NM SRC_STM_NM, ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_ID ACG_TP_ID, CL_VAL3.CL_VAL_NM TAX_LOT_TP, case when OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.CVRD_UNCVRD = 'C' then 'Y' else 'N' end COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F, CASE WHEN (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.RVST_F<>'Y' AND (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.MISS_COST_F = 'Y' OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.NULL_BSS_F = 'Y')) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END MISS_IVS_COST_F, #GLOBAL.GV_ODI_SESS_NO SESN_NUM, sysdate CRT_DTM, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.CRT_USR_NM CRT_USR_NM, sysdate LAST_UDT_DTM, OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.LAST_UDT_USR_NM LAST_UDT_USR_NM, 'I' IND_UPDATE from ((((((<?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT", "TAXLOT_STG_OWNER", "D") ?> OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "SRC_STM_DIM", "COMMON_OWNER", "D") ?> SRC_STM_DIM ON OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SRC_STM_ID=SRC_STM_DIM.SRC_STM_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.CCAL_PD_ID AS CCAL_PD_ID , CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.CIRD_PD_ID AS CIRD_PD_ID , CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.ACTV_F AS ACTV_F FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP WHERE (CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.ACTV_F='Y' ) ) CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1 ON CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1.CCAL_PD_ID= OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.CCAL_PD_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "ACG_TP_DIM", "COMMON_OWNER", "D") ?> ACG_TP_DIM ON ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_CD =OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.AC_TP_CODE ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL1 ON CL_VAL1.CL_VAL_ID= OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_TXN_EV_TP_ID and CL_VAL1.CL_SCM_ID=86 ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL2 ON CL_VAL2.CL_VAL_ID= OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.ORIG_TAX_LOT_TXN_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL3 ON CL_VAL3.CL_VAL_ID= OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.TAX_LOT_TXN_TP_ID and CL_VAL3.CL_SCM_ID=84 ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL ON CL_VAL.CL_VAL_ID= OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.SRC_RCRD_TP_ID where (1=1) ) X ) S on ( T.AR_ID=S.AR_ID and T.CCAL_PD_ID=S.CCAL_PD_ID and T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM=S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM and T.TXN_INTT_DT=S.TXN_INTT_DT ) when matched then update set T.SRC_STM_CD = S.SRC_STM_CD, T.CIRD_PD_ID = S.CIRD_PD_ID, T.ACG_TP_CD = S.ACG_TP_CD, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY = S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY = S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY = S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, T.END_DT = S.END_DT, T.EFF_DT = S.EFF_DT, T.ACG_TP_NM = S.ACG_TP_NM, T.ACQ_DT = S.ACQ_DT, T.ADJ_COST = S.ADJ_COST, T.CCY_CD = S.CCY_CD, T.CTF_NUM = S.CTF_NUM, T.CTF_NUM_PFX = S.CTF_NUM_PFX, T.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD = S.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, T.DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT = S.DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, T.EXG_RATE = S.EXG_RATE, T.FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN = S.FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, T.GIFT_DT = S.GIFT_DT, T.POS_INCPTN_DT = S.POS_INCPTN_DT, T.LONG_SHRT_POS_CD = S.LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, T.LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F = S.LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, T.LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN = S.LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, T.MISS_COST_BSS_F = S.MISS_COST_BSS_F, T.ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F = S.ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, T.OPN_PRC_FCTR = S.OPN_PRC_FCTR, T.OPN_TXN_EV_TP = S.OPN_TXN_EV_TP, T.COST_AMT = S.COST_AMT, T.ORIG_EV_TP = S.ORIG_EV_TP, T.ORIG_PRC = S.ORIG_PRC, T.ORIG_PROCD = S.ORIG_PROCD, T.ORIG_TXN_TP_CD = S.ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, T.PREM_AMT = S.PREM_AMT, T.QTY = S.QTY, T.SRC_RCRD_TP_CD = S.SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, T.RVST_LOT_F = S.RVST_LOT_F, T.SD = S.SD, T.TRD_NUM = S.TRD_NUM, T.TXN_TP_CD = S.TXN_TP_CD, T.UC = S.UC, T.SBC_UC = S.SBC_UC, T.WASH_SALE_F = S.WASH_SALE_F, T.ZERO_COST_BSS_F = S.ZERO_COST_BSS_F, T.WASH_SALE_TP = S.WASH_SALE_TP, T.SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT = S.SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, T.SBC_ADJ_COST = S.SBC_ADJ_COST, T.SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL = S.SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL, T.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR = S.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR, T.SBC_COST_AMT = S.SBC_COST_AMT, T.SBC_ORIG_PRC = S.SBC_ORIG_PRC, T.SBC_ORIG_PROCD = S.SBC_ORIG_PROCD, T.SRC_STM_ID = S.SRC_STM_ID, T.SRC_STM_NM = S.SRC_STM_NM, T.ACG_TP_ID = S.ACG_TP_ID, T.TAX_LOT_TP = S.TAX_LOT_TP, T.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F = S.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F, T.MISS_IVS_COST_F = S.MISS_IVS_COST_F, T.SESN_NUM = S.SESN_NUM, T.CRT_DTM = S.CRT_DTM, T.CRT_USR_NM = S.CRT_USR_NM, T.LAST_UDT_DTM = S.LAST_UDT_DTM, T.LAST_UDT_USR_NM = S.LAST_UDT_USR_NM when not matched then insert ( T.SRC_STM_CD, T.AR_ID, T.CIRD_PD_ID, T.CCAL_PD_ID, T.ACG_TP_CD, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, T.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, T.END_DT, T.EFF_DT, T.ACG_TP_NM, T.ACQ_DT, T.ADJ_COST, T.CCY_CD, T.CTF_NUM, T.CTF_NUM_PFX, T.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, T.DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, T.EXG_RATE, T.FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, T.GIFT_DT, T.POS_INCPTN_DT, T.LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, T.LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, T.LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, T.MISS_COST_BSS_F, T.ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, T.OPN_PRC_FCTR, T.OPN_TXN_EV_TP, T.COST_AMT, T.ORIG_EV_TP, T.ORIG_PRC, T.ORIG_PROCD, T.ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, T.PREM_AMT, T.QTY, T.SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, T.RVST_LOT_F, T.SD, T.TRD_NUM, T.TXN_INTT_DT, T.TXN_TP_CD, T.UC, T.SBC_UC, T.WASH_SALE_F, T.ZERO_COST_BSS_F, T.WASH_SALE_TP, T.SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, T.SBC_ADJ_COST, T.SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL, T.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR, T.SBC_COST_AMT, T.SBC_ORIG_PRC, T.SBC_ORIG_PROCD, T.SRC_STM_ID, T.SRC_STM_NM, T.ACG_TP_ID, T.TAX_LOT_TP, T.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F, T.MISS_IVS_COST_F, T.SESN_NUM, T.CRT_DTM, T.CRT_USR_NM, T.LAST_UDT_DTM, T.LAST_UDT_USR_NM ) values ( S.SRC_STM_CD, S.AR_ID, S.CIRD_PD_ID, S.CCAL_PD_ID, S.ACG_TP_CD, S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, S.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, S.END_DT, S.EFF_DT, S.ACG_TP_NM, S.ACQ_DT, S.ADJ_COST, S.CCY_CD, S.CTF_NUM, S.CTF_NUM_PFX, S.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, S.DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, S.EXG_RATE, S.FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, S.GIFT_DT, S.POS_INCPTN_DT, S.LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, S.LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, S.LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, S.MISS_COST_BSS_F, S.ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, S.OPN_PRC_FCTR, S.OPN_TXN_EV_TP, S.COST_AMT, S.ORIG_EV_TP, S.ORIG_PRC, S.ORIG_PROCD, S.ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, S.PREM_AMT, S.QTY, S.SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, S.RVST_LOT_F, S.SD, S.TRD_NUM, S.TXN_INTT_DT, S.TXN_TP_CD, S.UC, S.SBC_UC, S.WASH_SALE_F, S.ACG_TP_ID, S.TAX_LOT_TP, S.COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F, S.MISS_IVS_COST_F, S.SESN_NUM, S.CRT_DTM, S.CRT_USR_NM, S.LAST_UDT_DTM, S.LAST_UDT_USR_NM )

UPDATE TAXLOT_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT t SET t.end_dt = TO_DATE('#SSDS.SSDS_BATCH_DT','YYYYMMDD') WHERE t.end_dt = TO_DATE('29991231','YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TAXLOT_STG_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT s WHERE t.CCAL_PD_ID = s.CCAL_PD_ID AND t.AR_ID = s.AR_ID AND t.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM = s.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM AND trunc(t.TXN_INTT_DT) = trunc(s.TXN_INIT_DT) )
